data.title: 60% of presale participants for PUMP token moved to centralized exchanges, BitMEX notes positive funding rates despite high float.
data.description: BitMEX noted that the PUMP token has surprisingly shown positive funding rates despite having a substantial initial float. The token has managed to defy expectations and maintain a strong trend in its funding rates.

data.title: Antom Copilot 2.0, a merchant payment AI agent by Ant International, expands functions across integration, onboarding, risk config, and chargeback solutions. Launched in June 2024, it's built on Alipay+ GenAI Cockpit platform.
data.description: In Singapore, Ant International's merchant payment and digitization services provider, Antom, unveiled a significant enhancement to its leading AI agent, Antom Copilot. This update includes broader functionalities in payment integration, onboarding, risk configuration, and chargeback solution. Antom Copilot, the first AI agent for merchant payment services globally, was introduced in June 2024. It is developed on Ant International's Alipay+ GenAI Cockpit, an AI-as-a-Service (AIaaS) platform, facilitating fintech operations.

data.title: Elucid appoints Richard E. Kuntz, MD, MSc and Shamiram Feinglass, MD, MPH as directors at SCCT Montreal meeting.
data.description: At the recent Boston & SCCT Annual Meeting in Montreal, leading AI medical technology company Elucid announced significant developments. With a strong focus on enhancing the understanding of atherosclerosis for tailored patient treatment, the company welcomed Richard E. Kuntz, MD, MSc, and Shamiram Feinglass, MD, MPH to its Board of Directors. These additions mark a strategic move as Elucid advances its clinical research efforts and prepares for the commercialization of its premier technology, PlaqueIQTM. This announcement is tied to the upcoming SCCT2025 initiative, signaling a pivotal moment in Elucid's growth trajectory.

data.title: Fulgent Genetics gets EU CE Mark for FulgentExome & FulgentPLM, meeting EU In Vitro Diagnostic Regulation (EU) 2017/746.
data.description: Fulgent Genetics, Inc., a company traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol FLGT, headquartered in El Monte, California, disclosed today that it has obtained CE certification for its germline next-generation sequencing (NGS) system in compliance with the European Union's In Vitro Diagnostic Regulation (EU) 2017/746 (IVDR). The certified system, comprised of FulgentExome and Fulgent Pipeline Manager (PLM), has successfully met all the necessary requirements for distribution and use within the EU market. The certification enables Fulgent to expand its laboratory services and therapeutic development business to serve a wider population of clients in Europe.

data.title: Intel 471 and Sumo Logic partner for cybersecurity, enhancing threat intelligence to protect against attacks.
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, Intel 471, a top global provider of cyber intelligence solutions, and Sumo Logic, the leading SaaS Log Analytics Platform, have partnered to enhance cybersecurity measures. This collaboration aims to offer Intel 471's advanced threat intelligence to Sumo Logic users, boosting protection against complex cyberattacks. By integrating this intelligence, the partnership significantly decreases attackers' dwell time and enhances proactive threat mitigation, ultimately strengthening businesses' security posture.

data.title: ActiveCampaign named Leader in IDC MarketScape: AI-Enabled Marketing Platforms for Small Businesses among 8 vendors.
data.description: ActiveCampaign, a prominent marketing platform, was recently recognized as a Leader in the IDC MarketScape: Worldwide AI-Enabled Marketing Platforms for Small Businesses 2025 Vendor Assessment. Among 8 vendors evaluated, ActiveCampaign stood out for its strong capabilities and strategic outlook for the Small Business segment. The assessment, conducted in July 2025, is identified as doc # US53601925. ActiveCampaign's leadership position underscores its dedication to empowering small businesses with innovative marketing solutions.

data.title: Paystand moves up to CNBC/Statista top global fintech list, revolutionizing money movement between businesses.
data.description: A company based in Santa Cruz, California, Paystand, has been recognized as one of the top global fintech companies by CNBC and Statista. Specializing in blockchain-enabled payments, Paystand is revolutionizing the way businesses transfer money. This acknowledgment from CNBC and Statista signifies Paystand's prominent position in the fintech industry, highlighting its innovative approach to facilitating transactions between businesses on a global scale.

data.title: ACI Worldwide recognized in CNBC's Top Fintech 2025 & TIME's Best Mid-Size Cos 2025 lists, by Statista, for innovation.
data.description: ACI Worldwide, a leader in global payments technology, has been recognized for its excellence in the industry. The company was recently honored as one of CNBC’s World’s Top Fintech Companies 2025 and TIME’s America’s Best Mid-Size Companies 2025. These prestigious awards are given in collaboration with Statista Inc., a prominent statistics portal and industry ranking provider. ACI Worldwide, traded as NASDAQ: ACIW, continues to innovate and excel in the ever-evolving world of finance and technology.

data.title: F5 partners with MinIO to provide AI factories with secure and scalable data pipelines; targets modern AI workloads.
data.description: In Seattle, F5 (NASDAQ: FFIV) revealed an enhanced strategic alliance with MinIO, the primary provider of high-performance, object-native AI storage. This collaboration introduces a strong solution tailored for contemporary data-heavy AI operations, especially for AI factories that involve advanced inference and training cases necessitating data aggregation from diverse global endpoints and edge environments.

data.title: Abbott's Q2 2025 results show 7.4% sales growth, GAAP diluted EPS of $1.01, and adjusted diluted EPS of $1.26, with a reported gross margin of 52.7%.
data.description: In the second quarter, there was a 7.4 percent increase in reported sales, with organic sales growing by 6.9 percent or 7.5 percent when excluding COVID-19 testing-related sales. The second-quarter GAAP diluted earnings per share (EPS) were $1.01, while the adjusted diluted EPS reached $1.26. Additionally, the reported gross margin was 52.7 percent of sales.

data.title: Irish High Court approves Mallinckrodt plc's merger with Endo, Inc., expected to close in early August.
data.description: The merger between Mallinckrodt plc and Endo, Inc. (OTCQX: NDOI) is anticipated to be finalized in early August 2025. This significant step in the process was confirmed as the Irish High Court recently issued the required ruling for the merger to proceed. The companies are moving forward with their plan to combine forces through a stock-based transaction. This development marks a crucial milestone in the merger process, with both parties working towards a successful integration. Details regarding the merger's financial implications and its potential impact on the healthcare industry are expected to become clearer as the closing date approaches.
EUROPEAN COMMISSION REFERS HUNGARY TO THE COURT OF JUSTICE OF THE EUROPEAN UNION FOR CONTRADICTING THE UNION'S POSITION ON INTRA-EU ARBITRATIONS UNDER THE ENERGY CHARTER TREATY
EU PROPOSES JOINT BORROWING TO FINANCE €400 BILLION CRISIS TOOL

data.title: IRIS Software Group names Jason Dies as new CEO, effective July 14, 2025, succeeding Gus Malezis.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, IRIS Software Group, a prominent worldwide supplier of accountancy, education, HR, and payroll software, disclosed the selection of Jason Dies as its latest Chief Executive Officer, commencing duties on July 14, 2025. Dies takes over from Gus Malezis, the former CEO.

data.title: Jacobs to design Seattle light rail extension, enhancing community connections with Sound Transit's West Seattle Link Extension.
data.description: Jacobs, a leading company listed on the NYSE under the symbol J, has recently been chosen to offer design services for the West Seattle Link Extension by Sound Transit in Dallas. This initiative, aiming to enhance Seattle's light rail system, promises an expanded transit network that will not only ensure reliable mobility but also strengthen community connections. The project, scheduled to be completed by July 17, 2025, signifies a significant step towards boosting transportation infrastructure in the area and is set to cater to the growing needs of the population.
US Natural Gas Supply to Freeport LNG's Texas Export Facility Is Nearly Restoring, Indicating the Plant Is Coming Back to Full Operation
German Bundesbank President Warns That If Tariffs Happen in August, Germany Might Face a Recession in 2025

data.title: 36% of Gen Z use crypto daily, while Gen X leads in high-value spending. Crypto favored for gaming, daily purchases, and travel.
data.description: A surge in preference for cryptocurrency among Gen Z users is evident in categories like gaming, daily purchases, and travel bookings. These users are increasingly opting to use digital currencies in these areas, showcasing a shift away from traditional payment methods. This trend highlights a notable increase in the number of Gen Z individuals utilizing cryptocurrencies, underscoring a growing acceptance and adoption of this new form of currency.
UKRAINE RECEVIED 850,000 LARGE-CALIBRE AMMUNITION PIECES INCLUDING 320,000 155MM SHELLS UNDER CZECH INITIATIVE THIS YEAR AS OF MID JULY , CZECH DEFENCE MINISTRY SAYS

data.title: Q-Gold appoints Peter Tagliamonte as CEO; Dr. Andreas Rompel becomes COO & VP Exploration. Updates effective July 17, 2025.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Q-Gold Resources Ltd. revealed the appointment of Peter Tagliamonte, P.Eng. as its new Chief Executive Officer. This announcement marks Dr. Andreas Rompel transitioning to the position of Chief Operating Officer and VP Exploration at the company. Q-Gold Resources Ltd. is traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol QGR and on the OTC market as QGLDF. Dr. Rompel will continue serving on the board of directors.
